what_it_does: Records a channel attachment entry that links the design-assets channel to a specific image asset via an image:// URI and records when it was added.
observations: The file consists solely of YAML frontmatter with no body content
It declares an attachment of type images
standouts: The target filename contains spaces and parentheses: 'Icon_ConceptV_VCircle_White (1)'
It is a minimal metadata stub with only attachment linkage fields
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter for structured metadata
References the asset with an image:// scheme URI
Records provenance with an ISO 8601 timestamp
concerns: The target filename includes spaces and parentheses, which may cause encoding or path-handling issues
No title, description, or format information is provided
The attachment's relationship to a specific channel message or thread is not stated
notes: A bare attachment ledger stub pointing the design-assets channel to an icon image with a version-like filename suffix.
questions: What does '(1)' signify in the target filename—version, duplicate, or draft?
What channel message or thread is this attachment associated with?
What is the image format, dimensions, or intended usage?
purpose_vs_actual: The file acts as a metadata record for a channel image attachment, which matches its implicit purpose; there is no explicit purpose field to evaluate.
intention_signals: To create a durable, queryable record associating the design-assets channel with a specific icon image asset and capturing the moment it was added.
contribution: Provides a timestamped image attachment reference that links a channel to a specific design asset, supporting asset provenance and retrieval.
summary_for_embedding: This file is a YAML-frontmatter channel attachment record for the design-assets channel that points to the image asset Icon_ConceptV_VCircle_White (1) via an image:// URI and includes an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: This record was intended to catalog when a specific icon image was attached to the design-assets channel.
